productDisplayName: Fila Men's Elite White Black Shoe
description: A perfect blend of fashion and comfort, the fila Speed Up running shoe comes in a sleek design and is packed with features, making it a great buy.UpperHeavily meshed upper with strategically placed synthetic leather overlays for absolute breathable comfort and enhanced shoe structureLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfortPerformance footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with triangular lugs on the forefoot and a decoupled heel for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves on the forefoot for easy movementCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfortScooped heel for cushioning to the backfoot, enhancing shock absorption Shoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
